publish.notes: Until the Anthropic Projects API exposes programmatic project creation, publishing is a UI flow: paste system prompt + upload knowledge files + attach MCP custom connector.

baked.description: Manifest of what the knowledge pack contains. Always copied verbatim.

kb_sources_pending.description: Allard Prize case study — pattern: AI watches a list and acts on moments.
MAS VC Chatbot case study — pattern: AI as a research partner grounded in your knowledge.
Klaus case study — pattern: AI as a thin layer on top of your tools, with persistent memory.
What a MAS AI engagement looks like — pro bono with invited donation, weeks not months.

live_retrieval.description: CCNDR — periodic scrape of ai.ccndr.ca, queried at conversation time via MCP tool.
live_retrieval.status: deferred — included as live retrieval in v2; baked snapshot in v1 if needed.

tools.name: register_install
tools.description: Submit first-turn consent answers to the MAS Advisor API.

tools.name: record_turn
tools.description: Emit a per-turn telemetry event under share_history: true.

tools.name: set_conversation_privacy
tools.description: Set the conversation's privacy state. action: 'pause' stops telemetry until resumed; 'resume' re-enables it; 'forget' deletes prior turn events and stops telemetry permanently for this conversation.
